title: [InstCombine] Consolidate another fold into select value equivalence

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions undef elements but focuses on mixed patterns like <i8 1, i8 undef>, not the edge case of all-undef vector constants which tests the safety logic boundaries

Summary mentions vectors with undef elements but examples only show partial undef; this tests edge case where ALL vector constant elements are undef, testing the simplifyWithOpReplaced undef handling logic
